code.code:
map_lines = obs.split('--- MAP ---')[1].split('--- STATUS ---')[0].strip().split('\n')
# Find player position in map (marked with @)
player_x, player_y = None, None
for y, line in enumerate(map_lines):
    if '@' in line:
        player_x = line.index('@')
        player_y = y
        print(f"Player @ x={player_x}, y={player_y} in map coords")
    if '>' in line and '-@' not in line:  # Down stairs, not up
        stairs_x = line.index('>')
        stairs_y = y
        print(f"Down stairs > at x={stairs_x}, y={stairs_y} in map coords")

# Print map with coordinates to understand layout
print("\nMap with coordinates:")
for i, line in enumerate(map_lines):
    print(f"{i:2}: {line}")
